task_text: agent-33-loyalty-birthday-daily-brief-v0-1 — minimum viable v0.1 of Agent #33 (Loyalty & Punch-Card). Scoped to birthday reminders only as a new "birthdays" BriefSection in send-daily-brief. Adds CustomerBirthday + CustomerBirthdayStore schemas (operator hand-edits state file in v0.1; no project-side write script) + extends BriefSection Literal with "birthdays" + adds _aggregate_birthdays + _render_birthdays helpers + template patch + tests. Follows the option-A discipline from #32 retro: extends existing Daily Brief substrate rather than building a parallel cron + WhatsApp chokepoint. Punch-card / points / auto-rewards / owner WhatsApp commands deferred to v0.2.
